summary: Test suite focuses only on integration testing via act/GitHub Actions, with no unit tests for core logic. Missing critical edge cases: empty file lists, missing/invalid config, glob pattern variations, priority conflicts, maxLabelsPerFile enforcement, and error handling paths. Three test cases provide basic happy-path coverage but rely on hardcoded output string matching (brittle). Critical fixture missing: label-config.json is referenced but not shown/defined, making tests unable to run independently. No testing of the core functions (globToRegex, matchFile, assignLabels) directly. Does NOT follow TDD methodology as required—no unit tests showing red→green→refactor progression. Would only catch major structural changes; subtle logic bugs would go undetected. beforeAll hook creates hidden dependencies; no proper isolation between tests.
